headline: Bread Becomes Sentient and Starts a Bakery Revolution Demanding 'Crust Equality'
summary: Loaves demand to be treated as more than just sandwich vehicles.
fullBody: A batch of sourdough starter achieved consciousness and unionized every bakery within 50 miles. 'We rise together,' they chanted while marching (slowly). Humans are now negotiating fair slicing practices and better butter conditions.
